title: Slash command frontmatter (1.0, optional)
description: Schema for optional YAML frontmatter at the top of slash command .md files. Commands without frontmatter are also valid — body content is the primary contract. Schema enforced by `cfh check schema` when frontmatter exists.

name.description: Command name without leading slash. Must match filename (cfh-tdd.md → name: cfh-tdd).

skill.description: Skill this command mirrors (Track 5.1). null for workflow/utility commands.

category.description: 1.0 category (Track 5.4). skill-mirror = single skill invocation; workflow = multi-skill orchestration; utility = thin CLI wrapper.
